---
id: get-blocking-tasks
title: "Get blocking task numbers"
description: "If the tasks is blocked by other tasks, it returns numbers of these tasks."
sidebar_label: "Get blocking task numbers"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get blocking task numbers"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/tasks/{taskNumber}/blocking-tasks"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



If the tasks is blocked by other tasks, it returns numbers of these tasks.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
